data.title: Anixa Biosciences reports 74% immune response in Phase 1 breast cancer vaccine trial, safe at max dose. Plans for Phase 2.
data.description: The vaccine was found to be safe and well-tolerated when administered at the maximum tolerated dose. The results indicated that moving the program into Phase 2 development is feasible. A combination of Keytruda® and the vaccine was successful in generating T cell responses, with no significant additional side effects observed. This outcome boosts confidence in the plans for a Phase 2 neoadjuvant study.

data.title: Dow Jones hit record highs, Broadcom predicts AI chip sales doubling, Nasdaq rebounds, while stock tumbles.
data.description: Both the Dow Jones and Russell 2000 indices achieved all-time highs as the Nasdaq recovered from early losses. Broadcom anticipates a twofold increase in sales of AI chips. Despite this forecast, Broadcom's stock is currently declining.

data.title: First Japanese edition of Humanoids Summit in Tokyo on May 28-29, 2026, expanding to Asia.
data.description: A conference known as the Humanoids Summit will be launching its inaugural event in Tokyo, Japan on May 28–29, 2026. The summit, originally held in Mountain View, California, focuses on Embodied AI and will take place at the Takanawa Convention Center. This expansion marks the event's first venture into Asia, showcasing the growing interest in artificial intelligence technology.

data.title: Law firm investigates Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. Board of Directors for alleged breach of fiduciary duty. 100 characters.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, the law firm Berger Montague PC issued a statement informing shareholders of Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. (NASDAQ: WBD) about an investigation being conducted concerning the Company's Board of Directors. The investigation focuses on potential issues related to governance. Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. is a notable company in the entertainment industry. No further details were provided regarding the specific concerns being looked into, and shareholders are advised to stay informed on the developments.

data.title: $500,000 committed by Colossal Foundation to restore North America's largest land bird to Hells Canyon after 100 years.
data.description: For over ten years, a collaboration has aided in facilitating the return of North America's largest land bird to Hells Canyon after an absence of more than a hundred years. The effort, led by a tribal group, received support from The Colossal Foundation, a charitable organization tied to Colossal. The partnership, which started a decade ago, played a crucial role in reintroducing the bird species back to its natural habitat in Hells Canyon. The achievement marks a significant milestone in conservation efforts, showcasing the positive outcomes that can arise from such long-standing collaborations.

data.title: Huawei launches Mate X7 and innovative products in Dubai, including HUAWEI FreeClip 2 and WATCH ULTIMATE DESIGN.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on December 11, 2025, Huawei introduced a range of cutting-edge devices at a launch event named "Unfold the Moment." The new lineup features the HUAWEI Mate X7 cellphone, HUAWEI FreeClip 2 wireless earphones, HUAWEI WATCH ULTIMATE DESIGN smartwatch, among other innovative products.

data.title: C$1M private placement announced by CHAR Technologies.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a peak of 7.2%, the highest level in over a decade. This spike has resulted in over 3.5 million people losing their jobs in the past year alone. Additionally, the inflation rate has surged to 5.3%, causing a significant increase in the cost of living. The government has announced measures to address these issues, including the implementation of job creation programs and economic stimulus packages. Experts warn that these challenges could have long-term effects on the economy if not addressed promptly.

data.title: PitchBook wins 2026 Buyer’s Choice Award for Finance & Accounting from TrustRadius based on customer feedback.
data.description: PitchBook, a prominent private capital market intelligence provider, was recently recognized as a winner of the 2026 Buyer’s Choice Award in the Finance and Accounting segment by TrustRadius, a subsidiary of HG Insights. This acknowledgment, solely determined by genuine customer input, demonstrates PitchBook's exceptional performance in areas such as capabilities, value, and customer satisfaction. The award reflects PitchBook's ongoing commitment to surpassing customer expectations.

data.title: Crunch Fitness to open $5M, 40K sq-ft gym in Madera, CA in Spring 2026.
data.description: In Madera, California, Crunch Fitness is set to launch Crunch Madera in Spring 2026. The cutting-edge fitness center will span 40,000 square feet and has incurred a cost of $5 million. Under the management of franchisee Fitness..., this new facility promises top-notch amenities and services for fitness enthusiasts in the area.

data.title: Willis Lease Finance Corp prices $392.9M in Fixed Rate Notes with $337.4M in Series A Notes and $55.5M in Series B Notes.
data.description: Willis Lease Finance Corporation, a leading lessor of commercial aircraft engines and global aviation services provider, announced through its subsidiary, Willis Engine Structured Trust IX, the pricing of $337.4 million in Series A Fixed Rate Notes and $55.5 million in Series B Fixed Rate Notes, totaling $392.9 million. The Notes will be secured by WEST's interests in a portfolio of 47 aircraft engines and two airframes, acquired from WLFC or its subsidiaries. The closing date for this transaction is set for December 23, 2025, as disclosed on December 11, 2025, in Coconut Creek, Florida.

data.title: Match Perfumes launches in the U.S. with 40-scent collection, celebrity guests & influencers gathered at NY launch party.
data.description: A vibrant launch event in New York gathered notable guests and influencers to unveil Match Perfumes' new collection of 40 scents. The event took place on December 11, 2025, showcasing the brand's mission to bridge the quality and affordability divide in the fragrance market.

data.title: Rio2 to file prospectus for "Bought Deal" equity financing. #Rio2 #equityfinancing #prospectus #filing
data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, showcasing a significant improvement compared to the previous month. The number of new jobs created in the past month stands at 250,000, exceeding economists' expectations by a wide margin. This surge in job creation has positively impacted various sectors, with the service industry seeing the most substantial growth. Additionally, average hourly wages have increased by 3.2% in the same time frame, highlighting a boost in worker earnings. The robust job market has instilled confidence in consumers, leading to an uptick in consumer spending across the board. Overall, these statistics paint a promising picture of economic growth and stability in the country.

data.title: Crypto entrepreneur Do Kwon, creator of Luna and TerraUSD, sentenced to 15 years for causing the 2022 crash after pleading guilty to fraud.
data.description: Renowned crypto designer Do Kwon, creator of the cryptocurrencies Luna and TerraUSD, both of which experienced significant declines in 2022, has admitted guilt to charges of fraud.
